programme.desc: The Movie Club

programme.title: Bunker
programme.desc: Lt. Vikram Singh is the only army officer who survives an attack on his bunker as a result of a ceasefire violation. He's critically injured, alone and must fight delirium and severe anguish until he's rescued.

programme.title: Ricky Bhai Yash
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Rudratandava
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Pandigai
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Jaanbaaz Commando
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Diamond Cartel
programme.desc: Only one lusted glance brings Aliya to the events throwing her into the criminal ocean. But in the wirliging of passions and turmoil when she finds herself at the verge of fatality it's only her true love that is the only rescue.Now the most important thing for Aliya is to preserve the honor and dignity and the whole world will be at our feet.

programme.title: A Picture to Remember
programme.desc: Masha is in love with Igor, her college mate, and wants to marry him, but he does not seem in much of a hurry to lead the girl to the altar.

programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Dead Mans Cards
programme.desc: When Tom's boxing career abruptly ends, he's offered a job as a door man at a run down night club, where he meets Paul, a volatile man with a history of violence. Soon it is unclear whether Tom has taken a step on the road to redemption, or finally hit the self-destruct button. Paul takes Tom under his wing to teach him the ropes, but he is soon at deadly odds with violent gangsters from the area.

programme.title: Captive
programme.desc: Yelena Diagileva, an ambitious businesswoman, dreams of rising to the top of the career ladder when she encounters an unexpected problem - she will have to 'win over' her boss's son in order to get her long-awaited promotion. Lena is almost ready to compromise her principles and forget about her husband, who prefers to sit quietly by the fire every evening, when disaster suddenly strikes, and Lena is abducted by a serial killer, Rodion.

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: On the day when the conspirators plan to murder Caesar, Tyrannus has been lured away.

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: Atia, the sister of Caesar, is coerced by the senate to reveal the contents of the late general's will.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Local track star "Flash" Gordon learns that his scientist father disappeared through a trans-dimensional rift.

programme.title: Strange Weather
programme.desc: A mother dealing with the death of her son, travels the back roads of the Deep South to settle a score.

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: On the day when the conspirators plan to murder Caesar, Tyrannus has been lured away.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Local track star "Flash" Gordon learns that his scientist father disappeared through a trans-dimensional rift.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Steel Rain 2: Summit
programme.desc: Leaders of South Korea, North Korea, and the U.S. hold a summit in Wonsan, North Korea to discuss North Korea's nuclear issue and peace in the Korean Peninsula. Interrupted by some North Korean hardliners who have raised a coup, the leaders of the three countries are abducted and taken away on a North Korean submarine. As the North Korean hardliners, the U.S., Japan, and China each set up their own plans for war, how will President HAN of South Korea, who is trapped inside a submarine, overcome this crisis?

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Time Pass
programme.desc: TIME PASS tells the story of a college student Vishal [Arjun Punj], who develops a passion towards Jenny [Mona Chopra]. In fact, Jenny also happens to be his family friend. Vishal is possessed with the idea of making love to Jenny.

programme.title: Matrubhoomi
programme.desc: A village is left without women due to their practice of female infanticide. When Ramsharan finally finds a young woman to marry his son, his entire village lusts after the only available woman.

programme.title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
programme.desc: Bharat, a small-time artist, finds himself dealing with the effects of a corrupt system. In the process, he himself discovers his ideals and decides to fight for the rights of the common people.

programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.desc: ‘원조 퍼포먼스 킹'의 귀환을 알리는 퍼포먼스도 기대를 모은다. ‘1 step 2 step 3 step 4' 전진 동작과 폭발적인 댄스 브레이크가 포인트. 멤버별 캐릭터가 드러나는 동선과 제스처로 보는 재미를 더한다.슈퍼주니어는 타이틀 곡 ‘Express Mode'로 ‘멋의 결정판'을 선사한다. 패기 넘치는 태도의 가사, 댄서블한 사운드, 중독적인 후렴으로 쿨한 에너지를 전한다.

programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' new single ‘STYLE' is an uptempo dance track featuring lively rhythms and groovy bass. The members' bright and bubbly vocals come together to deliver a feel-good energy, capturing Hearts2Hearts' cheerful and lovable charm.

programme.title: WayV Music Video & Performance Special
programme.desc: Track List: Diamonds Only Phantom Phantom (Performance Video) Good Life No One But You + INVINCIBLE (极限) Poppin' Love (心动预告) On My Youth (遗憾效应) New Ride (浪漫公路) Give Me That FREQUENCY (超频率) HIGH FIVE On My Youth (English Ver.) Give Me That (Korean Ver.) FREQUENCY (Korean Ver.)

programme.title: aespa 'Dirty Work' MV
programme.desc: “Dirty Work” is a dance track with catchy synth bass and cool vocal melodies, showing off a more Chill and Cool side of their sound. In the music video, the members turn into bold resistance fighters who take on any kind of “dirty work” for each other, highlighting their strong sense of unity. The performance blends fierce, powerful moves with a hint of sensual flair, creating a stage that's full of contrast and energy.

programme.title: Red Velvet Music Video & Performance Special
programme.desc: Track List: TILT, Baby, Not Baby, 28 Reasons, Like A Flower, Cosmic, Wish You Hell, Chill Kill, Birthday, Monster, Feel My Rhythm, Queendom, Hello , When This Rain Stops, Like Water, Sweet Dreams

programme.desc: From brain implants that allow paralyzed patients to communicate to the wearable devices enhancing human capabilities, brain-computer interfaces could change the way people use their minds forever.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology exploring the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how people die.

programme.title: Roblox's Predator Problem
programme.desc: Tens of millions of kids play Roblox daily, but is the internet's playground safe? Bloomberg investigates cases of predators who have used the platform to groom and sometimes meet kids in real life.

programme.title: Sex-for-Work Claims in West Africa's Rubber Industry
programme.desc: A company majority-owned by billionaire Vincent Bolloré's Bolloré Group and Hubert Fabri is the subject of allegations of labor abuses at some of its African rubber plantations, including by female workers who say they were forced to engage in sex. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Building wealth used to follow a formula, but these days it's easier than ever to play the markets. With investing tools at everyone's fingertips, is it a chance for generational wealth or a siren call for suckers?

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Wall Street pros often play poker, chess, blackjack and other games that rely on skills that are highly transferable to their work the lines between finance and gaming are blurring faster than ever.

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: Finance is an industry dominated by men, but women are rising and controlling more wealth globally how did the women of Wall Street break through, and what's changing now that they have?

programme.title: Bullish With Sonali Basak
programme.desc: There's been a migration of financial powerbrokers to South Florida in recent years, drawn by various factors. It's hard to imagine the capital of finance leaving New York, but Wall Street South is getting bigger every day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The demand for human eggs is booming, giving rise to a largely unregulated and dangerous marketplace in India, meeting a teenage girl caught up in this fertility underworld.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Brazil's largest bank robbery at the heart of the brazen heist is South America's most dangerous gang and its raid on what's is known as the Night of Terror.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: IM Academy sold a dream of financial freedom but behind the luxury lifestyles and Instagram hype, thousands found themselves inside a multi-level marketing maze that left many broke and broken.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me

programme.desc: Dustin admits to cheating on his partner with his middle-school crush psychic Nana says she has a premonition that her fiance is sleeping with her friend Desiree believes that another woman is contending with her over her boyfriend.

programme.desc: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal two women battle it out for a porn star's love Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.

programme.title: Neverland Prophecy
programme.desc: Nobody ever asks Michael for anyt_hing: when Wendy needs help she asks John and when John needs help, he asks Wendy… and when Mrs. Darling needs somet_hing from her children, she asks her two eldest children! It's as if Michael doesn't know how to do anyt_hing. He's tired of feeling useless… but he can't seem to t_hink of anyt_hing that he does better than his older siblings (and that really irritates him). Peter happens to drop by just at that moment. Noticing that Michael is sulking, he suggests that they forget all about it for a few hours, and take a quick trip to Neverland. Nobody there cares about being useful or not! And off they go to the Imaginary Land.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome Epi 04
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 01
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awasome Epi 01
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment. Toys, along with the audience, learn about colors, shapes, objects, come out of difficult situations, learn about friendship and the world in general. The series is simple, kind and funny.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Robinhood EP 16
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King Ep 16

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: Some aliens have tracked down a boom cart. But the module has been stolen. The thieves have only left their initials behind: G.G. The Da Boom crew must track down the mysterious thieves.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom crew land on the scrap planet after a battle. They need a few spare parts to repair their ship. But the inhabitant of the junkyard, Zurge, doesn't want to help the kids.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: In search of the next Boom Cart, the kids land on the planet Gaffa. But immediately after landing, they are attacked by vicious Larvites.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom Crew has landed in a remote desert town inhabited by rather strange-looking aliens. The aliens ask the kids to ask the Great Protector for help.

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The villain Scorch wants the light of the entire universe to go out and the galaxy to kneel at his feet. The Da Boom Crew must find all the Boom Carts as quickly as possible.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded

programme.title: License to Grill
programme.desc: Going once, going twice, gone. Rob and his friends are donating their special keepsakes to a Silent Auction to raise money for charity. They head over to Robs for a quick and delicious pre-auction chowdown that includes lemon pepper Cornish Hens, sweet monkfish, chili lime shrimp and stuffed pork tenderloin.

programme.title: License to Grill
programme.desc: Rob likes to Rock and Roll all night and BBQ every Saturday. This time he rocks out with his buddy Jim's Band "Giver". While they belt out the tunes, Rob creates his own hits with grilled lamb chops, crispy potato skins, beef brisket and smoked Proscuitto wrapped shrimp.

programme.title: License to Grill
programme.desc: Ole! Rob serves up a Spanish Tapas BBQ that includes spicy lamb ribs, beef tenderloin, blackened scallops, proscuitto wrapped figs stuffed with blue cheese and gazpacho vodka in cucumber cups. The portions are small, but the taste is huge! And that's no bull.

programme.title: License to Grill
programme.desc: Rob likes clowning around, but he is the Ringmaster of his own Carnival Day BBQ. After a fun day at the fair, Rob keeps the party going with a fairground finger food like pizza burgers, homemade pogos, pork ribs and cool iced tea.

programme.title: License to Grill
programme.desc: Rob and his friends are hitting the bike trails. After a long bike ride, Rob grills up a high protein meal of veal ribs, steelhead trout, southwestern black bean salad and pistachio and honey crusted lamb racks.

programme.title: License to Grill
programme.desc: The liquor cabinet is getting too full so Rob is throwing a Boozy BBQ with the left over spirits from parties past. He pulls together a feast of tequila chicken breasts, white wine veal chops, martini and grilled tarragon mushrooms.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Pork and the grill are good buddies and host Spencer Watts shows us four of his favourite pork recipes that will have you salivating.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Fun and quirky host Chef Spencer Watts kicks off this episode by showing off his knife skills as he sabres a pineapple to start his instant classic Grilled Fruit Salad. The pineapple joins a mix of bright summer fruits on the grill, then berries, spicy citrus vinaigrette and savoury feta cheese. Next up, Spencer whips up his Hawaiian Chicken recipe. Spiced with cayenne and Chinese five spice, Spencer stuffs flavourful chicken thighs with pineapple and grills it with a delightful ginger and soy sauce. Every bite is sweet, savoury, and fresh - exactly how summer should taste! Then Spencer shares his top tips for adding smoky flavours to pork using an easy and handy smoke pouch. His Apple Smoked Pork Tenderloin is bathed in a fog of applewood smoke and he then tops it with tart apple-blueberry compote. Cinnamon buns are amazing with a bit of orange peel - but have you ever had them in an orange peel and on the grill? That's right and Spencer shows you how you can make fun and flavourful Orange Peel Cinnamon Buns on the barbecue using indirect heat.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Onions, green onions, chives, garlic, and leeks are all members of the same fabulous flowering family, Allium! First up? Chef Watts shows us his sweet and smoky Charred Leeks with Romesco add grilled toast and you have your next party appetizer! Next up is a main course. Spencer starts with a juicy grilled pork chop, then adds roasted garlic melted into a balsamic onion chutney to make his out-of-this-world Roasted Garlic Pork Chops. Looking for a crowd pleaser that's easy to make? Spencer has a recipe for that! Chicken Yakitori. He threads skewers with crunchy green onions and tender chicken and caramelizes the yakitori sauce as he grills this tasty dish. Are you ready to drool? Spencer shows us how to make Allium your main dish with Stuffed Vidalia Onions. Loaded with savoury bacon, salty blue cheese and garlic, you'll want to eat this dish for every meal!

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Have a cheese lover coming over? Blow their minds with some of Spencer's "grate" barbecued cheese recipes! First up, Spencer chars Brie Cheese to an ooey-gooey perfection and tops it with tart cherries and crunchy walnuts, serving it with crispy grilled crostinis. Next up is a Grilled Steak and Caesar with a twist only Spencer could add - grilled... lettuce! Then, Spencer uses the classic German "hasselback" presentation to stuff chicken breasts with verdant spinach, yummy Swiss cheese and pungent sun- dried tomatoes, grilling them to melty perfection. Finally, Spencer fires up his barbecue to make his Grilled Peaches with Salted Bourbon Caramel, a decadent dessert elevated with creamy Mascarpone and perfectly balances sweet, smoky, and salty flavours.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: In this bacon loving episode, Chef Spencer delivers a tasty Bacon Weave Turkey Breast, which gets injected with beer and spices before being wrapped up in its cozy bacon blanket and sent off to the grill! Next up? A Peameal Bacon Roast with Rosti. This heavy hunk of back bacon gets smoked to flavourful perfection while Chef Watts makes the crispiest golden-fried-to-perfection potato pancake. Then, Spencer whips up a charry, grilled, super decadent, bacon-wrapped and bacon stuffed cheeseburger. Spencer isn't finished with bacon yet! For his final recipe, Spencer stuffs an apple with decadent crispy morsels stuffed along with savoury caramelized onions and melty cheddar cheese.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: This episode kicks off with Spencer's tasty Grilled Caesar Salad. He skillfully piles of char-grilled romaine lettuce wedges and sourdough croutons are topped with tangy dressing, crispy pancetta, and shards of a homemade parmesan tuile. For his next recipe, Spencer whips up Grilled Zucchini Boats that filled with fresh ingredients including orzo pasta, summer veggies, and herbs. Chef Watts loves a good steak and his Grilled Cauliflower Steak is not one to be passed up! Dusted in Middle Eastern Spices, flame roasted and served with chili-spiked, Yemeni 'Skhug' hot sauce and pomegranate seeds. Finally, Spencer steams tender artichokes, stuffing these flowers with breadcrumbs and stretchy-melty cheese, and finishes this delicious dish on the grill.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Welcome to BBQing 101. The team gives the school term a kick start for some rowdy university students. Smoked Pulled Pork with Tangy BBQ Sauce, Spiced up Beer Can Chicken and Chili Yam Fries give these scholars a taste of simple, healthy BBQed food.

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Punta Del Este, Uruguay
programme.desc: With sprawling beaches, iconic monuments and a unique mix of colonial and modern architecture, it is the jewel of Uruguay's southern coast. Often called the “Pearl of the Atlantic”, likened with Miami and Cannes, it is the city of Punta del Este.

programme.title: Voronezh town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was finished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: The Trinity Cathedral, Saint Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Spread out on the coast of the Gulf of Finland, at the mouth of the Neva River, St. Petersburg is the second-largest city in Russia. Witness of both military and civil history, the Trinity Cathedral of Izmailovsky, part of the historic center of St. Peter"&"sburg is a world heritage site.

programme.title: Novi Sad Synagogue, Serbia
programme.desc: Right in the city center of Novi Sad, Serbia, this crucial area, on Jevrejska Street – literally, Jewish Street - the synagogue of Novi Sad occupies a prominent spot both geographically as well as in the historical annals of the city.

programme.title: Mar Elias Monastery
programme.desc: Mar Elias monastery lies on the side of the road from Jerusalem and Bethlehem. It is maintained by the Greek-Orthodox church, and by local tradition Elijah rested here while fleeing from Queen Jezebel

programme.title: City of Venice, Italy (Part 2)
programme.desc: Celebrated throughout the world for its singular beauty, discover Venice and some of its famous places. An open-air museum that seems to float on its lagoon, and a World Heritage Site.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. It retains the ancient cultural values and still maintains its traditional style while rejecting the technology that has changed everything.

programme.title: Sifnos, Cyclades island, Greece
programme.desc: An elegant island, symbolic of the Cyclades, discover the Greek island of Sifnos, full of contrasts, where the most arid mountains rub shoulders with the greenest valleys, and where monasteries dominate sandy beaches.

programme.title: Bosa Old town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: The beautiful Bosa Old Town finds itself in Alghero To Oristano, an area strongly influenced by Spanish culture. The city is generally considered to have been founded in 1102. However, long before the Christian era, the Phoenicians set up a trading post o"&"n this exposed bay in western Sardinia.

programme.title: HOTELS in Singapore Part 2
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Brazil

programme.title: Arnad town, Aosta Valley, Italy
programme.desc: Arnad town in Aosta Valley is known for the production of the D.O.C Montjovet wine. The small medieval village stands on the banks of the Dora Baltea. It is situated on the banks of the Dora Baltea. Arnad has its roots in tradition: from rock climbing a"&"mong the most famous Alps to the walks in the woods of chestnut or between churches and castles, testimonies of a great past. Nature, sport, history, genuine flavors, relaxation.

programme.title: Voronezh Town, Russia
programme.desc: In the southern part of Russia, by the river Voronezh, there is a city with the same name. It has a long history of remarkable men and women who prospered and fell here. The city fought for freedom countless times and brought a lot of talented artists to "&"the world. It is a city of strong people and fantastic architecture. Voronezh was founded in 1585 when tsar Fyodor ordered to start the building of a new fortress on the Voronezh-river's bank to create a barrier from southern invasions. The fortress was f"&"inished around 1586 and defended Russians only for four years before it was burnt to the ground by cossacks.

programme.title: The Good Samaritan Museum, Israel Part 2
programme.desc: On the road from Jerusalem to the Dead Sea, discover the Good Samaritain Museum, an archaeological and historical site. This museum, which is the only mosaic museum in the country and one of only three in the world, has artefacts which were unearthed in J"&"udea, Samaria and Gaza on display. You are in the area of Ma'ale Adumim (Red Heights), on the same road that pilgrims used to take on their way to Jerusalem, particularly those coming from the Galilee via the Jordan Valley and Jericho, in the footsteps of"&" Jesus and John the Baptist…

programme.title: Pskov City, Russia
programme.desc: Pskov: One of the most beautiful and ancient cities located in the north-west of Russia on the Velikaya River! Only 20 kilometers from the Estonian border, church-studded city Pskov is dominated by its mighty riverside Kremlin: an enormous bulwark that ha"&"s faced up to its fair share of invading armies down the centuries.

programme.title: Carloforte Old Town, Sardinia, Italy
programme.desc: Approximately 7 kilometers off the Southwestern Coast of Sardinia, there is an Island with rugged cliffs, no rivers, and a coastline full of beautiful coves. This is San Pietro. On this Island, only one town: Carloforte. It is an Italian village in Southe"&"rn Sardinia, as well as an honorary city of Genoa.

programme.title: HOTELS in the Baleares: Mallorca
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Barcelona in Spain.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: The team embark on their biggest mission to date, an expedition to the remote and revered Minerva Reefs, where they encounter the most incredible diving conditions they've ever experienced, but also, a thriving population of voracious sharks!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: After punching their way to North Minerva, the fellas continue their quest to land a big pelagic, but the local toothies threaten to throw a spanner into the team's plans. Can they bag a tropical trophy, or will the sharks rain on their parade?

programme.desc: Brothers Max & Benj Cave undertake a run where they attempt to escape from Lisbon castle without using any conventional exit routes.

programme.title: Something in the Water

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat's cheese in the heart of Virginia's Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: USA Through Music

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Chicago is a city of both innovation and tradition. From immigrants cooking up classics to world-renowned chefs creating new concoctions with modern technology, Andrew gets a taste of Chicago's diverse food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Andrew takes to the road to sample the Pennsylvania staples most people never hear about. A Japanese superstar chef cooks up poisonous sexual organs and a family boils up every part of the pig.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Santa Fe, N.M., the cafe with a native Kenyan in the kitchen serving up totally fresh fish. And in Albuquerque, N.M., the school lunch maven crankin' out creative sammies like turkey avocado with green apple chile chutney.

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
